SEARCH
Module overrungl.stb
Package overrungl.stb

Enum Class STBIRPixelLayout

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<STBIRPixelLayout>
overrungl.stb.STBIRPixelLayout
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<STBIRPixelLayout>, Constable, overrun.marshal.CEnum
public enum STBIRPixelLayout extends Enum<STBIRPixelLayout> implements overrun.marshal.CEnum
stbir_pixel_layout specifies:
number of channels
order of channels
whether color is premultiplied by alpha
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    _1CHANNEL
     
    _2CHANNEL
     
    _4CHANNEL
     
    ABGR
     
    ABGR_NO_AW
     
    ABGR_PM
     
    AR
     
    AR_NO_AW
     
    AR_PM
     
    ARGB
     
    ARGB_NO_AW
     
    ARGB_PM
     
    BGR
    3-chan, with order specified (for channel flipping)
    BGRA
     
    BGRA_NO_AW
     
    BGRA_PM
     
    RA
     
    RA_NO_AW
     
    RA_PM
     
    RGB
    3-chan, with order specified (for channel flipping)
    RGBA
    alpha formats, where alpha is NOT premultiplied into color channels
    RGBA_NO_AW
    alpha formats, where NO alpha weighting is applied at all! these are just synonyms for the _PM flags (which also do no alpha weighting).
    RGBA_PM
    alpha formats, where alpha is premultiplied into color channels

    • RGBA_NO_AW

      public static final STBIRPixelLayout RGBA_NO_AW
      alpha formats, where NO alpha weighting is applied at all! these are just synonyms for the _PM flags (which also do no alpha weighting). These names just make it more clear for some folks).

    • BGRA_NO_AW
